query_result.output_text: Now I have all the data confirmed. Let me compile the complete analysis.
query_result.reasoning:
I now have all the data confirmed. Let me compile the final answer.

**Q1 2026 Segment Adjusted EBITDA:**
- Space: $(351) million
- Connectivity: $2,087 million
- AI: $(609) million

**Q1 2026 Segment Capex:**
- Space: $1,052 million
- Connectivity: $1,332 million
- AI: $7,723 million

**FCF Proxy (Segment Adjusted EBITDA − Capex):**
- Space: −351 − 1,052 = −$1,403 million
- Connectivity: 2,087 − 1,332 = $755 million
- AI: −609 − 7,723 = −$8,332 million

**Annualized at Q1 2026 run-rate:**
- Connectivity annualized FCF proxy: $755M × 4 = $3,020 million
- AI annualized capex: $7,723M × 4 = $30,892 million

**Years of Connectivity annualized FCF proxy to fund one year of AI capex:**
= $30,892 / $3,020 = 10.23 years

Note: These figures reflect the recast consolidated entity (including xAI and X Holdings) for all historical periods presented.

tool_calls.name: submit_final_result
tool_calls.args:
{"final_result": "## Segment-Level FCF Proxy Analysis — Q1 2026

**Note:** All figures reflect the recast consolidated entity (including xAI merged Feb 2, 2026 and X Holdings merged into xAI Mar 28, 2025) for all historical periods presented. No period reflects standalone SpaceX operations exclusively.

### Q1 2026 Segment Data (Three Months Ended March 31, 2026, in $ millions)

| Metric | Space | Connectivity | AI |
|---|---|---|---|
| Segment Adjusted EBITDA | $(351) | $2,087 | $(609) |
| Capital Expenditures | $1,052 | $1,332 | $7,723 |
| **FCF Proxy (Adj. EBITDA − Capex)** | **$(1,403)** | **$755** | **$(8,332)** |

### Calculation: Connectivity FCF Proxy vs. AI Capex

**Step 1 — Annualize Connectivity FCF Proxy at Q1 2026 run-rate:**
$755M × 4 = **$3,020 million**

**Step 2 — Annualize AI Capex at Q1 2026 run-rate:**
$7,723M × 4 = **$30,892 million**

**Step 3 — Years of Connectivity annualized FCF proxy to fund one year of AI capex:**
$30,892M ÷ $3,020M = **10.23 years**

### Answer

It would take approximately **10.23 years** of Connectivity's annualized Q1 2026 FCF proxy ($3.02 billion/year) to fund one year of AI segment capex at the Q1 2026 run-rate ($30.89 billion/year). This stark ratio underscores the extraordinary capital intensity of the AI segment — driven by xAI's GPU cluster and data-center buildout — which vastly exceeds the cash-generating capacity of the Connectivity (Starlink) segment, even though Connectivity is the only segment producing positive FCF proxy.

{
  "sources": [
    {
      "url": "https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1181412/000162828026036936/spaceexplorationtechnologi.htm",
      "name": "SpaceX S-1 Filing (May 20, 2026)"
    }
  ]
}"}

## Segment-Level FCF Proxy Analysis — Q1 2026

**Note:** All figures reflect the recast consolidated entity (including xAI merged Feb 2, 2026 and X Holdings merged into xAI Mar 28, 2025) for all historical periods presented. No period reflects standalone SpaceX operations exclusively.

### Q1 2026 Segment Data (Three Months Ended March 31, 2026, in $ millions)

| Metric | Space | Connectivity | AI |
|---|---|---|---|

| Capital Expenditures | $1,052 | $1,332 | $7,723 |
| **FCF Proxy (Adj. EBITDA − Capex)** | **$(1,403)** | **$755** | **$(8,332)** |

### Calculation: Connectivity FCF Proxy vs. AI Capex

**Step 1 — Annualize Connectivity FCF Proxy at Q1 2026 run-rate:**
$755M × 4 = **$3,020 million**

**Step 2 — Annualize AI Capex at Q1 2026 run-rate:**

**Step 3 — Years of Connectivity annualized FCF proxy to fund one year of AI capex:**
$30,892M ÷ $3,020M = **10.23 years**

### Answer

It would take approximately **10.23 years** of Connectivity's annualized Q1 2026 FCF proxy ($3.02 billion/year) to fund one year of AI segment capex at the Q1 2026 run-rate ($30.89 billion/year). This stark ratio underscores the extraordinary capital intensity of the AI segment — driven by xAI's GPU cluster and data-center buildout — which vastly exceeds the cash-generating capacity of the Connectivity (Starlink) segment, even though Connectivity is the only segment producing positive FCF proxy.
